knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-023-Internal-Audit Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: AU-019 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: AU-001 Audit independence | Governance | Reject conflicted assignment | Critical | Audit Committee. AU-002 Audit Committee approval | Governance | Require approval for plan/opinion | Critical | Audit Committee. AU-003 Audit universe completeness | Evidence | Flag gap in coverage | High | Internal Audit. AU-004 Risk-based plan | Governance | Reject unapproved plan | High | Internal Audit. AU-005 Engagement scope approval | Preventive | Reject undocumented scope change | High | Internal Audit. AU-006 Workpaper evidence | Evidence | Block closure without evidence | Critical | Internal Audit. AU-007 Evidence hash | Evidence | Reject unhashed evidence | High | Internal Audit. AU-008 Sampling method approval | Governance | Reject unapproved methodology | High | Internal Audit. AU-009 Control test reproducibility | Evidence | Require documented test steps | Critical | Internal Audit. AU-010 Finding severity approval | Preventive | Reject unapproved severity change | High | Internal Audit. AU-011 Root cause required | Evidence | Block closure without root cause | High | Internal Audit. AU-012 Management response required | Preventive | Block closure without response | High | Internal Audit. AU-013 Remediation owner and due date | Preventive | Reject finding without owner/date | High | Internal Audit. AU-014 Independent remediation verification | Preventive | Reject self-verified closure | Critical | Internal Audit. AU-015 Finding closure approval | Preventive | Require Internal Audit sign-off | Critical | Internal Audit. AU-016 Final opinion authority | Governance | Reject unauthorized opinion issuance | Critical | Audit Committee. AU-017 AI opinion prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI opinion-issuance permission | Critical | AI Governance. AU-018 AI closure prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI finding-closure permission | Critical | AI Governance. AU-019 Cross-tenant access denial | Preventive | Deny | Critical | Security. AU-020 Management edit restriction | Preventive | Deny auditee edit of audit record | Critical | Internal Audit. AU-021 Issue aging escalation | Corrective | Escalate by age/severity | High | Internal Audit. AU-022 Repeat finding escalation | Corrective | Elevate severity and oversight | High | Internal Audit. AU-023 Continuous assurance validation | Detective | Validate automated test coverage | High | Internal Audit. AU-024 Audit trail | Evidence | Require full evidence chain | Critical | Internal Audit. AU-025 Evidence retention | Preventive | Enforce retention schedule | Critical | Internal Audit.
